ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie */,
  "original_language" TEXT /* Original language of the movie */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the movie (e.g., Released, Planned) */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "spoken_languages" TEXT /* Languages spoken in the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview or plot summary of the movie */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes the movie has received */,
  "score" REAL /* Score calculated based on various metrics */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "production_countries" TEXT /* Countries where the movie was produced */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* Official homepage of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_production_companies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword_name" TEXT /* Name of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_keywords" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spoken_languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the spoken language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_spoken_languages" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spoken language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cast member */,
  "character" TEXT /* Character played by the cast member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the cast member */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the cast member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "job" TEXT /* Job title of the crew member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the crew member */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who gave the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating value given by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rating was given */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., IMDB, Rotten Tomatoes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie being reviewed */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the review */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the review was written */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular user, moderator, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
